name: github-it-admin
description: Operator-side IT admin plugin for GitHub-tier operations: claude-code OAuth rotation, repo→org secret promotion, secrets parity audit, branch-protection ruleset CRUD, and a security-aware linter for Claude Code Action workflows (.github/workflows/claude*.yml). Dogfoods OSEC1/OSEC2/OSEC3 (secret model), OIT1 (minter pattern), and OAUTO13 (workflow security baseline) into a single plugin that exercises the full claude-code plugin spec: skills + hooks + monitors + agents + MCP server.

gh_org.title: GitHub organization
gh_org.description: Org for secret promotion + branch-protection ops. Defaults to subagentceo for this chassis.

gh_repo.title: GitHub repository
gh_repo.description: Repo name (without owner). Defaults to knowledge-engineering for this chassis.

secret_max_age_days.title: Secret rotation max age (days)
secret_max_age_days.description: Secrets older than this trigger a drift notification from the secret-age-watch monitor.
